name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝗸𝗻𝗼𝘄 | “wanna tell me why a sweet thing like you is out?” | in which Satoru finds you alone at the bar.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤ

FOR MY INTROVERTS CUZ FUCKKKK NIGHTLIFE 🗣🗣🗣

I personally do not find parties/clubs/etc fun AT ALL 😭

I understand the appeal and why people enjoy it, and on paper it sounds fun, but I've never found the fun in big parties like that. Everytime I have been miserable and have wanted to go home 😩

I find it so unfortunate how I have no introverted friends 😭, most of my friends want to go out and dance —I would rather sever my left ear Van Gough style

Also thank you guys for all the sweet comments on my last bot, I appreciate all the advice 🩵

moving on,

Very vague intro cause that's how I like it, but I know some of y'all aren't the most creative so here are some things you can put in the chat memory + scenes to play out:

  • {{char}} is {{user}}'s ex-boyfriend.

    • User just had a bad date or got ghosted

    • User got abandoned by their friends

    • User was drinking to get over the break up

  • {{char}} is {{user}}'s best friend

    • User was trying to get into night life

    • User was pressed by another friend

    • User went out with their bf who left them alone

  • {{char}} is {{user}}'s rival.

    • User got hella drunk trying to get over a break up

    • User was trying to get laid

    • User and Satoru haven't seen eachother in a while

Of course, you can mix and match the dynamics and scenarios. As always, feel free to share any other ones you do!

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down

ㅤ
